creator: gja822@narod.ru
text:
On the FreeBSD forum I've posted some details: https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/gdk-pixbuf2-problem.85118/

During upgrade of graphics/gdk-pixbuf2 it leaves gdk-pixbuf-query-lo.core file in /usr/ports/graphics/gdk-pixbuf2 directory on install stage (not in work subdirectory).
But then it states that port's upgrade is successful.

But after that x11-toolkits/gtk20 fails to upgrade:

/usr/local/bin/gdk-pixbuf-csource --raw --build-list        \
        apple_red  ./apple-red.png    \
                gnome_foot ./gnome-foot.png    \
        > test-inline-pixbufs.h              \
|| (rm -f test-inline-pixbufs.h && false)
failed to load "./apple-red.png": Couldn't recognize the image file format for file "./apple-red.png"
gmake[4]: *** [Makefile:1044: test-inline-pixbufs.h] Error 1


So, I suppose, gdk-pixbuf2 do not work properly.

I've tried to upgrade all dependencies of gdk-pixbuf2, but without luck. So, now I have no working MATE.

I'm on FreeBSD 12-STABLE.
